mapper.insert: MERGE INTO STUDY_STATUS S USING ( SELECT #{memberNo} AS MEMBER_NO, #{contentType} AS CONTENT_TYPE, #{contentNo} AS CONTENT_NO FROM DUAL ) T ON ( S.MEMBER_NO = T.MEMBER_NO AND S.CONTENT_TYPE = T.CONTENT_TYPE AND S.CONTENT_NO = T.CONTENT_NO ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET S.STUDY_STATUS = #{studyStatus}, S.UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE, S.DELETE_FL = 'N' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( STATUS_NO, MEMBER_NO, CONTENT_TYPE, CONTENT_NO, STUDY_STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, DELETE_FL ) VALUES ( SEQ_STUDY_STATUS_NO.NEXTVAL, #{memberNo}, #{contentType}, #{contentNo}, #{studyStatus}, SYSDATE, NULL, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT STATUS_NO AS statusNo, MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, CONTENT_TYPE AS contentType, CONTENT_NO AS contentNo, STUDY_STATUS AS studyStatus, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt, DELETE_FL AS deleteFl FROM STUDY_STATUS WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND DELETE_FL = 'N'
